stages.name: Environment Setup
stages.description: Create repository, install dependencies, download datasets and models
actions: Create repository skeleton with directories src/, data/, configs/, and models/.
Install dependencies: pip install torch torchvision numpy matplotlib tqdm.
Download CIFAR-10 dataset and extract into data/cifar10/.
Download Tiny Imagenet dataset and extract into data/tiny-imagenet/.
Clone the official repository into external/AMUN/ and inspect code structure.
Set up a ResNet-18 model definition in src/models/resnet18.py.
Set up a VGG-19 model definition in src/models/vgg19.py.

stages.name: Train Baselines
stages.description: Implement and train all baseline methods for comparison
actions: Write a shared training harness src/train_utils.py with dataloaders, training loop, and metric logging.
Implement Retrain baseline script baselines/retrain.py: train new model on D_R only.
Implement FT baseline script baselines/ft.py: fine-tune pretrained model on D_R.
Implement RL baseline script baselines/rl.py: fine-tune on D_F with random labels.
Implement GA baseline script baselines/ga.py: gradient ascent on D_F to maximize forget error.
Implement BS baseline script baselines/bs.py: boundary shifting with mislabeling.
Implement l1-Sparse baseline script baselines/l1_sparse.py: fine-tune with L1 reg.
Implement SalUn baseline script baselines/salun.py: compute saliency mask and masked fine-tune on D_R.

stages.name: Train Proposed Method
stages.description: Implement and train the proposed method
actions: Write script main/initial_train.py to train classifier on full dataset and save checkpoint.
Write script main/partition.py to split data into D_F, D_R, D_T given forget percentage.
Write script main/adversarial_dataset.py to generate adversarial examples from D_F using PGD-50 with adaptive L2 epsilon.
Write script main/assemble_dataset.py to combine D_R, D_F, D_A according to availability rules.
Write script main/fine_tune.py to fine-tune model on assembled dataset for 10 epochs with cross-entropy, learning rate grid search, and optional saliency mask.
Run python main/initial_train.py --dataset cifar10 --arch resnet18 to obtain pretrained model f.
Run python main/partition.py --forget_percent 10 to create data splits.
Run python main/main_pipeline.py to execute adversarial generation, dataset assembly, and fine-tuning end-to-end.

stages.name: Evaluation
stages.description: Run evaluation on all experiments and compute metrics
actions: Run python eval/unlearn_eval.py to compute Unlearn, Retain, and Test accuracies for all trained models.
Run python eval/run_rmia.py --method RMIA to compute FT AUC for each unlearned model.
Write script eval/average_gap.py to compute Average Gap between each method and the Retrain baseline metrics.
Run python eval/average_gap.py to generate gap comparison tables.
Generate comparison plots for Average Gap across methods using scripts/eval_plots.py.
Compile all metrics into a single CSV file results/AMUN_summary.csv.

stages.name: Final Verification
stages.description: Compare reproduced results against paper claims
actions: Compare reproduced Average Gap values with Table 1 of the paper, flagging deviations > 1%.
Verify that AMUN achieves smallest Average Gap among approximate methods when D_R is available.
Verify that AMUN outperforms other methods without D_R access by checking gap table.
Check that RMIA AUC for AMUN after 10% unlearning is near 0.5 (random) using eval output.
Confirm test accuracy drop after unlearning does not exceed reported values in paper.
Run continuous unlearning simulation (5 sequential requests of 2%) and compare with paper results.
